name: Dominance Ice
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Fortress Shield: For each enemy hero within 5 units, Hybrid Defense is increased by 8, up to 40. Unique Passive - Lifebane: Taking damage will reduce the Shield and HP Regen effects of the attacker to 60% of normal for 1 second.

name: Oracle
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Bless: Received Shield and HP Regen effects are increased by 30%.

name: Holy Crystal
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Mystery: Gains 21%-35% extra Magic Power (scales with level)

name: Immortality
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Immortal: Resurrect 2.5 seconds upon death and gets 16% Max HP and a shield that can absorb 150(+70*Hero Level）damage. Shield lasts 3 seconds. This effect has a 210 seconds cooldown.

name: Antique Cuirass
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Deter: When hit by a skill, reduces the attacker's Physical Damage by 6% for 2 seconds (this effect stacks up to 3 times).

name: Endless Battle
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Divine Justice: After casting a skill, the next Basic Attack within 3 seconds deals (60% Total Physical Attack) extra True Damage and recovers 80 (+40% of Total Physical Attack) HP (1.5 seconds cooldown).

name: Tought Boots
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Fortitude: CC and Slow Duration reduced by 25%.

name: Guardian Helmet
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Recovery: After 5 seconds out of combat, recover (2.5% Total HP) HP per second. Unique Passive - Defender: Upon taking more than 500 damage in a single instance, the excess damage beyond that amount is reduced by 20 (+0.2% Total HP)%.

name: Rapid Boots
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Side Effect: Loses 20 Movement Speed for 5 seconds upon dealing or taking damage.

name: Athena's Shield
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Shield: Upon taking Magic Damage from enemy hero skills or Basic Attacks, reduces Magic Damage taken by 25% for 3 second (including the damage that triggers the effect)s. Regains this effect 5 seconds after leaving combat.

name: War Axe
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Fighting Spirit: Attacks grants 12 extra Physical Attack per second for 4 seconds, up to 6 stacks. Deals 10% extra True Damage based on the damage dealt (no damage reduction counted) at full stacks. (Marksmen, Mages, and Supports only receive 50% of these stacked effects.)

name: Berserker Fury
stats: Pasif: Unique Attribute: +40% Crit Damage Unique Passive - Doom: Critical strikes grant 5% extra Physical Attack for 2 seconds.

name: Blade of Despair
stats: Pasif: Dealing damage to non-Minion enemies below 50% HP grants 25% extra Physical Attack for 2 seconds (takes effect before the damage is dealt).

name: Concentrated Energy
stats: Pasif: Unique Attribute: +20% Hybrid Lifesteal Unique Passive - Recharge: Increases Magic Power by 5 after dealing Magic Damage (this effect stacks up to 6 times and can only gain 1 stack every 0.4 second). When reaching full stacks, increases Magic Damage by 12% for 5 seconds.

name: Corrosion Scythe
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Corrosive: Basic Attacks gain 80 extra Physical Damage and slow the target by 8% (halved for ranged Basic Attacks) for 1.5 seconds. Stacks up to 5 times. Unique Passive - Impulse: Basic Attacks grant 6% extra Attack Speed for 3 seconds, capped at 5 stacks.

name: Divine Glaive
stats: Pasif: Unique Attribute: +40% Magic Penetration Unique Passive - Spellbreaker: When attacking an enemy, gains 0.1% extra Magic Penetration for each point of the enemy's Magic Defense, capped at 20%.

name: Hunter Strike
stats: Pasif: Unique Attribute: +15 Physical Penetration Unique Passive - Retribution: Dealing damage to the same enemy hero or creep 5 times in a row grants 50% extra Movement Speed that decays over 3 seconds (8 seconds cooldown).

name: Malefic Roar
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Armor Buster: Increase Physical Penetration by 30%. Unique Passive - Breaker: When attacking an enemy, gains 0.% extra Physical Penetration for each point of the enemy's Physical Defense, capped at 30%.

name: Queen's Wings
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Demonize: When HP drops below 40%, gains 30% Damage Reduction for 3 seconds and reduces skill cooldowns by 2 seconds. This effect has a 60 seconds cooldown. Unique Passive - Defiance: For every 1% HP lost, damage is increased by 0.25%, up to 15%.

name: Rose Gold Meteor
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Dragon Scale: Every 4 extra Physical Attack increase Hybrid Defense by 1. Unique Passive - Lifeline: When taking damage from enemy hero that reduces HP below 30%, gains a (120*Hero Level) shield (increases with level) and 50% Movement Speed that rapidly decays over 3 seconds. This effect has a 60 seconds cooldown.

name: Sea Halberd
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Lifebane: Dealing damage to a target will reduce the Shield and HP Regen effects on them to 60% of normal for 3 seconds. Unique Passive - Punish: Increase damage by 8% against enemy heroes with higher extra HP.

name: Sky Piercer
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Lethality: After dealing damage to an enemy hero, executes the hero if their HP is lower than 4%. Gains 10 stack(s) of Lethality for each kill and loses 30% current stack(s) for each death. Each stack of Lethality increases the HP threshold of the execute effect by 0.1%, stacking up 80 times.

name: Windtalker
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Typhoon: Every 5–2 seconds (reduced by 0.2 seconds for each Basic Attack), the next Basic Attack will hit up to 3 enemy units for 150–362 Magic Damage. (This attack can Crit and the damage increases to 200% against Minions.)

name: Brute Force Breastplate
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Brute Force: Each second after dealing damage, gain 8 extra Adaptive Attack and 2% extra Movement Speed for 4 seconds, up to 6 stacks. Gain 25% extra Control Duration Reduction at full stacks.

name: Thunder Belt
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Thunderbolt: Every 4 seconds, the next Basic Attack deals 50 (+100% Extra Physical Defense) (+100% Extra Magic Defense) extra True Damage to the target and enemies around them, and briefly slows them by 99%. Hybrid Defense permanently increases by 1 each time the attack hits an enemy hero. (This effect is reduced to 50% for Marksmen and Mages)

name: Warrior Boots
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Valor: Gains 4 extra Physical Defense for 3 seconds when taking Physical Damage, up to 20.

name: Blade of the Heptaseas
stats: Pasif: If no damage is taken or dealt within 5s, the next Basic Attack will deal extra Physical Damage equal to 160 plus 40% Physical Attack, and inflict 40% slow effects upon the target for 1.5s.

name: Blood Wings
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Guard: Gains a 800 (+100% Magic Power) Shield that will regenerate 20 seconds after being damaged. The Shield also grants 30 Movement Speed while it lasts and 150 Movement Speed for 1 second after it breaks.

name: Chastise Pauldron
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Chastise: Taking damage will reduce the Attack Speed and Attack Speed cap of the attacker to 75% of normal for 2 seconds. Unique Passive - Redemption: When incoming damage reduces HP below 30%, recover 20% Max HP over the next 2 seconds. This effect has a 60 seconds cooldown.

name: Genius Wand
stats: Pasif: Unique Attribute: +10 Magic Penetration Unique Passive - Magic: Dealing Magic Damage to enemy heroes will reduce their Magic Defense by 2.5+(0.5*Hero Level) for 2 seconds. Stacks up to 3 times.

name: Glowing Wand
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Scorch: Dealing Magic Damage burns the targets for 3 seconds, also dealing extra Magic Damage equal to 1% of the target's Max HP per second. Unique Passive - Lifebane: Dealing damage to the target will reduce the Shield and HP Regen effects on them to 60% of normal for 3 seconds.

name: Haas Claws
stats: Pasif: Unique Attribute: +20% Lifesteal Unique Passive - Frenzy: Critical strikes grant 20% extra Attack Speed for 2 seconds.

name: Clock of Destiny
stats: Pasif: Gains 30 HP and 5 magic power every 30 seconds, up to 10 stacks.

name: Demon Hunter Sword
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Engulf: Basic Attacks deal 8% of the target's current HP as extra physical damage (capped at 60 against minions). Unique Passive - Devour: Each Basic Attack recover (10+4*Hero Level) HP, and counts as an Attack Effect

name: Golden Staff
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Swift: Every 1% extra Crit Chance gained is converted into 1% extra Attack Speed. Unique Passive - Endless Strike: After every 2 non-Crit Basic Attacks, the Attack Speed of the next Basic Attack is increased by 80% (and Attack Speed cap is increased to 500%) and triggers Attack Effects an additional 2 time(s).

name: Great Dragon Spear
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Supreme Warrior: After casting an Ultimate, increase Movement Speed by 30% for 7.5 seconds. This effect has a 15 seconds cooldown.

name: Ice Queen Wand
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Ice Bound: When a skill deals damage to an enemy hero, it will also slow them by 10% for 2 seconds (stacks up to 3 times). This effect has a 1 second cooldown.

name: Lightning Truncheon
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Resonate: Every 6 seconds, the next skill echoes, dealing 255 (+85% Magic Power) extra Magic Damage to all enemies in range.

name: Malefic Gun
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Armor Buster: Increase Physical Penetration by 30%. Unique Passive - Malefic Energy: Increases Basic Attack range by 12%. When hitting a target, gains 10% Movement Speed for 0.5 seconds.

name: Radiant Armor
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Holy Blessing: Taking Magic Damage grants 5(+1*Hero Level) Magic Defense for 5 seconds, up to 6 stacks ( can only gain 1 stack(s) every 0.4 seconds).

name: Cursed Helmet
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Burning Soul: Deals (1.2% Total HP) Magic Damage to nearby enemies per second. This damage is increased by 125(+15*Hero Level)% against creeps and minions. Unique Passive - Curse: Dealing damage with Burning Soul will reduce the target's Hybrid Defense by 3 for 3 seconds. Stacks up to 3 times.

name: Demon Shoes
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Mysticism: Getting a kill or assist on an enemy Minion will restore 4% Mana. (An assist occurs when a Minion dies within 2 seconds after taking damage from the hero.)

name: Feather of Heaven
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Affliction: Each Basic Attack deals extra 50 (+30% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage. Unique Passive - Impulse: Basic Attacks grant 6% extra Attack Speed for 3 seconds, capped at 5 stacks.

name: Flask of the Oasis
stats: Pasif: Unique Attribute: +12% Healing Effect Unique Passive - Blessing: When casting a healing or shield skill, if the target's HP is below 35%, or falls below 35% within 3 seconds, they will get a (100*Hero Level) shield that lasts 3 seconds. When this effect triggers, it also reduces the cooldown of the caster's skills by 2 seconds. (This effect can only trigger once every 60 seconds on the same target, and will not trigger on self-only healing and shield skills.)

name: Starlium Scythe
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Crisis: After casting a skill, the next Basic Attack within 3 seconds deals 100 (+100% Total Magic Power) extra True Damage and reduces the target's Movement Speed by 40% for 1.5 seconds (5 seconds cooldown).

name: Wind of Nature
stats: Pasif: Unique Active - Wind Chant: Become immune to all Physical Damage for 2 seconds (duration is halved for non-Marksmen; 90 seconds cooldown).

name: Wishing Lantern
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Butterfly Goddess: For every 900 Magic Damage dealt to an enemy hero (calculated before Damage Reduction), a Butterfly Goddess is summoned to attack the enemy hero, dealing Magic Damage equal to 8% of their Current HP.

name: Azure Blade
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Judgement: After casting a skill, the next Basic Attack within 3 seconds deals 50 extra True Damage (1.5 seconds cooldown).

name: Black Ice Shield
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Fortress Shield: For each enemy hero within 5 units, Physical & Magic Defense is increased by 4, up to 20

name: Blade Armor
stats: Pasif: Unique Attribute: +20% Crit Damage Reduction Unique Passive - Bladed Armor: When struck by a Basic Attack, deals Physical Damage equal to 30 (+2% Total Physical Defense)% of the incoming damage (calculated before Damage Reduction) to the attacker and slows them by 15% for 1 second.

name: Dreadnaught Armor
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Deter: When hit by a skill, reduces the attacker's Physical Damage by 4% for 2 seconds (this effect stacks up to 3 times).

name: Elegant Gem
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Gift: When HP drops below 50%, recovers 15% of HP over the next 3 seconds. When Mana drops below 50%, restores 15% of Mana over the next 3 seconds. Cooldown: 60 seconds.

name: Enchanted Talisman
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Mana Spring: Regenerates 15% of Max Mana every 10 seconds. Unique Passive - Magic Mastery: Max Cooldown Reduction is increased by 5%.

name: Magic Blade
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Lifeline: When taking damage that reduces HP below 30%, gains a (+60*Hero Level) shield (increases with level) and 50% Movement Speed that rapidly decays over 3 seconds. This effect has a 60 seconds cooldown.

name: Molten Essence
stats: Pasif: Unique Passive - Burning Soul: Deals (0.6% Total HP) Magic Damage to nearby enemies per second. This damage is increased by 125(+15*Hero Level)% against creeps and minions.

name: Winter Crown
stats: Pasif: Unique Active - Frozen: Becomes frozen, untarge, and immune to damage for 2 seconds (100 seconds cooldown). Cannot move or cast skills while frozen, but skills already cast won't be interrupted.
